description: An account manager analyzes ticket trends for a client to identify recurring problems.

nodes.task_description: Export all tickets for a client for the last quarter.

expected_outcome.value: The manager has a CSV file of all recent tickets.

nodes.task_description: Categorize and analyze the data to identify the most common ticket types.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis reveals that 'password reset' tickets are the most frequent category, indicating a potential for user training or a self-service solution.

nodes.task_description: Propose implementing a self-service password reset (SSPR) solution to the client to reduce ticket volume and improve user experience.

expected_outcome.value: A data-driven recommendation is made to the client.
